finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_16.md:13; chapters/chapter_16.md:117; chapters/chapter_16.md:453; chapters/chapter_16.md:473; chapters/chapter_16.md:563; chapters/chapter_16.md:607
finding_results.notes: Reduced the repeated quoted-notice cadence by keeping the opening station stamp as a sharp early placard moment, then shifting later stops into other textures of Hoarded residue: a stripped appeal box at the farmstead, a fresh site-command seal at the communal well, a glass-fronted records case on the approach, a burned-out notice frame with survivor gouging at the dead settlement, and a safety pictogram with empty signature boxes at camp.

summary: Chapter 16 now varies how Hoarded absurdity appears on the road, relying less on repeated posted notices and more on physical residue, stripped infrastructure, official markings, and local speech while preserving the chapter's confession engine and strongest bureaucratic beats.
